productDisplayName: Redtape Men Margate Black Casual Shoe
description: For the non-conformist high-fashion male, this pair of shoes from red tape is the right choice. Styled in genuine, soft leather for optimal comfort, this pair does not compromise on its style quotient. Upper Leather upper for comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of wear Elasticated gores on the sides of the tongue for a customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
